items.title: Alachua County Commission hears criticisms of ACAR report, discusses roads that are in disrepair, and explores proposal for workforce housing
items.summary: County officials are exploring workforce housing proposals, addressing infrastructure needs that impact development feasibility and property values.

items.title: Gainesville mayoral and commission candidates address GRU, housing, East Gainesville
items.summary: Local leadership candidates are prioritizing housing solutions, signaling potential policy changes affecting residential development and community growth.

items.title: Florida migration slowed sharply in 2025, with mid-sized counties continuing to grow
items.summary: Marion County continues attracting residents despite statewide migration slowdown, indicating sustained local demand for housing and development.

items.title: Despite Mary Esther Elementary setback, vet touts life-changing plan for local housing crisis
items.summary: Local initiative addresses Okaloosa County's housing shortage through a proposed development plan aimed at increasing residential availability.
